title: The Old Curiosity Shop
description: The Old Curiosity Shop — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.description: A knowledge wiki for Charles Dickens's novel The Old Curiosity Shop (1840–1841)

memes.label: Uncopyright

memes.label: Abel Cottage
memes.description: The Garlands' beautiful thatched cottage in the countryside outside London, where Kit Nubbles finds employment and a second family — a pastoral sanctuary that contrasts with the novel's urban squalor and represents the domestic warmth and stability that Dickens offers as an ideal.

memes.label: Abel Garland
memes.description: The kindly employer of Kit Nubbles, father of Barbara, and one of the novel's models of benevolent middle-class respectability — a contrast to the corruption of Quilp and the Brasses

memes.label: Addiction
memes.description: The destructive cycle of compulsive behaviour, particularly gambling, that drives the central tragedy in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Anxiety
memes.description: The pervasive atmosphere of dread, uncertainty, and nervous anticipation that propels the narrative of The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Appearance vs. Reality
memes.description: The tension between surface appearance and underlying truth — a thematic thread running through The Old Curiosity Shop that shapes character perception, moral judgment, and narrative irony

memes.label: Appetite
memes.description: The representation of physical and moral hunger — for food, wealth, power, and sensation — in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Astley's Theatre
memes.description: A place of entertainment frequented by Dick Swiveller in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Barbara
memes.description: A character in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Beauty
memes.description: The contrast between inner beauty and external appearances as a moral and aesthetic principle in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Becky Morgan
memes.description: A deceased person buried in the village churchyard, whose age becomes a matter of anxious speculation for the sexton in Chapter 54.

memes.label: Bevis Marks
memes.description: The London street in the City where Sampson Brass maintains his law office — a cramped, dusty, and morally dubious establishment that serves as a key setting for the novel's legal intrigue, Dick Swiveller's employment, and the Marchioness's servitude.

memes.label: Charity and Mercy
memes.description: Charity in The Old Curiosity Shop — not the institutional charity of the Victorian poor law but the personal, spontaneous generosity of humble characters whose mercy transforms the lives it touches

memes.label: Mr. Cheggs
memes.description: A market-gardener who successfully courts Sophy Wackles, displacing Dick Swiveller as her suitor; his modest prosperity and bashful manner make him a representative of the novel's practical, unromantic matrimonial economy.

memes.label: Childhood
memes.description: Dickens's portrayal of childhood as a state of moral clarity, vulnerability, and redemptive potential in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Class and Status
memes.description: The rigid social hierarchy of Victorian England and its profound effects on characters' fates and relationships in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Codlin and Short
memes.description: Thomas Codlin and Harris "Short" Trotters, the travelling Punch and Judy showmen whom Nell and her grandfather encounter in a country churchyard and travel with to the races — Codlin the surly misanthrope, Short the cheerful merrymaker, together forming one of Dickens's great comic double-acts.

memes.label: Courage
memes.description: The many forms of courage displayed by characters facing adversity in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Cruelty and Kindness
memes.description: The moral poles of human behavior in The Old Curiosity Shop — Quilp's sadistic cruelty contrasted with the redemptive power of small acts of kindness.

memes.label: The Old Curiosity Shop
memes.description: The antique shop in London owned by Nell Trent's grandfather, filled with "old and curious things" — suits of mail, rusty weapons, distorted figures, tapestries, and strange furniture — whose loss to Daniel Quilp sets the novel's central journey in motion.

memes.label: Curiosity
memes.description: The theme of curiosity as exploration, wonder, and the tension between innocent inquiry and dangerous knowledge in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Daniel Quilp
memes.description: The villainous dwarf and primary antagonist in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Death
memes.description: The pervasive theme of death in The Old Curiosity Shop — from the opening meditation on suicide to the climactic death of Little Nell

memes.label: Death and Dying
memes.description: The pervasive presence of mortality in The Old Curiosity Shop — Nell's death as the novel's emotional center, contrasted with Quilp's violent end and the symbolic deaths that punctuate the narrative.

memes.label: Deception
memes.description: The manifold forms of deception in The Old Curiosity Shop — self-deception, financial fraud, legal manipulation, and the lies characters tell themselves and others — as a driver of plot and a measure of moral character

memes.label: Despair
memes.description: The state of utter hopelessness experienced by characters facing ruin, poverty, and death in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Desperation
memes.description: Desperation as a psychological state and narrative driver in The Old Curiosity Shop — the extremity of need that precipitates action, reveals character, and tests Dickens's moral framework.

memes.label: Determination
memes.description: The quality of resolute will that drives both heroic endurance and destructive obsession in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Dick Swiveller
memes.description: The charming, improvident clerk in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Dick Swiveller's Transformation
memes.description: Dick Swiveller's moral awakening and transformation into a figure of courage in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Disguise
memes.description: Disguise and concealment in The Old Curiosity Shop — the masks, deceptions, and hidden identities through which Dickens explores the gap between appearance and reality.

memes.label: Dreams
memes.description: Dreams and dreaming in The Old Curiosity Shop — the boundary between sleeping and waking through which Dickens explores desire, fear, and the inner lives of his characters.

memes.label: Duty
memes.description: The theme of duty in The Old Curiosity Shop, explored through character, plot, and Dickens's moral vision

memes.label: Education
memes.description: The role of formal and moral education in The Old Curiosity Shop, explored through the schoolmaster figure, Miss Monflathers's establishment, and the contrast between book-learning and innate goodness.

memes.label: Employment
memes.description: The pursuit of work and the economic precarity of employment in The Old Curiosity Shop, reflecting the unstable labour market of early Victorian England.

memes.label: Family
memes.description: A central thematic concern in The Old Curiosity Shop — Dickens explores family as both biological bond and chosen community, examining the devastation caused by broken families and the redemptive power of surrogate kinship in a world where blood ties have failed.

memes.label: Fate and Destiny
memes.description: The role of fate, providence, and fortune in The Old Curiosity Shop — a narrative poised between fatalistic resignation and the assertion of individual moral agency

memes.label: Fear
memes.description: Fear as a governing emotion in The Old Curiosity Shop — the grandfather's fear of poverty, Nell's fear for her grandfather's sanity, and the atmosphere of dread that Quilp generates wherever he appears

memes.label: Forgiveness
memes.description: The theme of forgiveness in The Old Curiosity Shop, explored through intergenerational conflict, moral transgression, and the limits of human mercy.

memes.label: Frederick Trent
memes.description: Nell's dissolute older brother, whose cynical exploitation of his family's ruin — collaborating with Quilp and dismissing his sister's suffering — establishes him as one of the novel's most morally compromised figures

memes.label: Friendship
memes.description: Friendship in The Old Curiosity Shop — the bonds that form between characters across class and age, the comic friendship of Swiveller and the Marchioness, and the novel's affirmation that friendship is one of the few goods that suffering cannot destroy

memes.label: Gambling and Fortune
memes.description: Gambling in The Old Curiosity Shop — not merely a plot device but the novel's central metaphor for the destructive pursuit of fortune, the grandfather's compulsion that consumes his family, and Dickens's moral critique of speculation as the disease of an age

memes.label: Gender
memes.description: Gender roles and feminine identity in The Old Curiosity Shop, examined through Dickens's portrayal of women characters across the domestic, moral, and social spheres.

memes.label: Gold
memes.description: The gold coin that Nell preserves through the darkest stretches of her journey — a physical token of hope, self-denial, and the tension between material wealth and spiritual value that defines the novel's moral landscape.

memes.label: Grandfather Trent
memes.description: Nell's grandfather whose gambling addiction sets the plot in motion in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Grandfathers and Father Figures
memes.description: The unusual concentration of flawed or absent father figures in The Old Curiosity Shop and what it reveals about Dickens's treatment of failed patriarchy

memes.label: Gratitude
memes.description: Gratitude as a moral force in The Old Curiosity Shop — Kit's gratitude to the Trents, Nell's gratitude to her benefactors, and Dickens's vision of gratitude as the virtue that binds the deserving poor to one another in a world that offers them little else

memes.label: Greed
memes.description: The destructive force of avarice and material desire driving the central conflicts in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Grotesque
memes.description: The grotesque as an aesthetic mode in The Old Curiosity Shop — the distorted, exaggerated, and monstrous forms through which Dickens renders human nature and social corruption.

memes.label: Guilt
memes.description: The theme of guilt as psychological burden and moral reckoning in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Hope
memes.description: One of the central thematic forces in The Old Curiosity Shop — the sustaining power that drives Nell and her grandfather through their wanderings, the fragile thread that connects characters to the possibility of redemption, and the quality Dickens ultimately affirms even in the face of devastating loss.

memes.label: Humanity and Inhumanity
memes.description: The dichotomy between compassionate human warmth and cold, often cruel, indifference that structures the moral universe of The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Hunger
memes.description: Physical and metaphorical hunger in The Old Curiosity Shop — the deprivation that drives characters to desperation and reveals social inequality.

memes.label: Innocence
memes.description: The theme of innocence as embodied by Nell Trent and other child characters in The Old Curiosity Shop, contrasted against the corrupting influences of urban life and greed in Victorian England

memes.label: James Groves
memes.description: The landlord of the Valiant Soldier public-house, a boastful but ultimately good-natured host who provides shelter to Nell Trent and her grandfather during their journey, and later serves as a character witness at the trial of Kit Nubbles.

memes.label: Jerry
memes.description: The manager of a troupe of performing dogs who entertains at the Jolly Sandboys inn, a minor figure in the travelling-show world that Nell Trent encounters on her journey.

memes.label: The Journey
memes.description: The picaresque journey as narrative structure, physical displacement, and spiritual pilgrimage in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Justice
memes.description: The operation and failure of justice in The Old Curiosity Shop — from the false accusation against Kit Nubbles to the ultimate exposure of the Brass conspiracy, Dickens examines how legal institutions serve (and betray) the innocent

memes.label: Kindness
memes.description: The quiet virtue of human kindness as a redemptive force in The Old Curiosity Shop — expressed through acts of hospitality, loyalty, and compassion that counterbalance the novel's darker forces

memes.label: Kit Nubbles
memes.description: The loyal young friend of Nell Trent in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Kit's Employment
memes.description: Kit Nubbles finds honest work and demonstrates his steadfast character in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Kit's Handkerchief
memes.description: Kit Nubbles's handkerchief — a humble object that appears at key moments in his story, serving as a token of his essential decency, his devotion to his mother, and the domestic virtue that distinguishes him from the novel's morally compromised characters.

memes.label: Kit's Trial
memes.description: The false accusation, trial, and eventual exoneration of Kit Nubbles in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Labor
memes.description: Physical toil, domestic drudgery, and the dignity of labour in The Old Curiosity Shop, with particular attention to class and gender dimensions of work.

memes.label: Little Jacob
memes.description: The younger brother of Kit Nubbles, whose innocence and vulnerability deepen Kit's characterisation as a devoted elder sibling and whose presence in the Nubbles household represents the domestic warmth that the novel's central characters have lost.

memes.label: London Bridge
memes.description: The bustling bridge over the Thames where the narrator first encounters Nell in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: London versus the Countryside
memes.description: The structural binary that organizes the novel's geography and moral scheme — urban corruption versus rural purification

memes.label: Loneliness
memes.description: The theme of loneliness and isolation in The Old Curiosity Shop, pervading Nell's solitary journey and the lives of characters around her.

memes.label: Loss and Bereavement
memes.description: The experience of loss in The Old Curiosity Shop — of loved ones, of home, of security, and ultimately of life itself — as the novel's most pervasive emotional register and the test by which its characters are measured

memes.label: Madness
memes.description: The representation of psychological breakdown, irrationality, and the blurring of sanity in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Melancholy
memes.description: The pervasive mood of sadness and contemplative sorrow that colours the narrative world of The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Melodrama
memes.description: Dickens's use of melodramatic conventions in The Old Curiosity Shop — heightened emotion, stark moral contrasts, and theatrical set-pieces that shape the novel's distinctive narrative mode.

memes.label: Memory
memes.description: The power of memory and remembrance as sources of meaning, identity, and moral continuity in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Mercy
memes.description: Mercy in The Old Curiosity Shop — the plea for divine mercy that frames Nell's journey, the human mercy shown by strangers on the road, and Dickens's vision of mercy as the virtue that bridges justice and love

memes.label: Miss Cheggs
memes.description: The sister of Mr. Cheggs the market-gardener, who acts as her brother's ally in his courtship of Miss Sophy Wackles at the Wackles party in Chapter 8.

memes.label: Miss Edwards
memes.description: A pupil at Miss Monflathers's boarding school who is publicly humiliated by the governess for an act of charity toward Nell Trent, exemplifying the moral cruelty of institutional education in the novel.

memes.label: Miss Jane Wackles
memes.description: The eldest daughter of Mrs. Wackles, a proud and sharp-tongued young lady who assists her mother at the Chelsea day school and serves as a comic foil to her sister Sophy in the courtship plot involving Dick Swiveller.

memes.label: Miss Monflathers
memes.description: The headmistress of the boarding school whose encounter with Nell Trent produces one of the novel's most sustained passages of social satire — a portrait of institutional pomposity and the cruelty of those who wield authority over children without understanding them

memes.label: Sophy Wackles
memes.description: A pupil at Mrs. Wackles's Chelsea school and the object of Dick Swiveller's romantic affections, whose eventual marriage to the market-gardener Cheggs marks one of the novel's quieter sentimental subplots.

memes.label: Motherhood
memes.description: The absent, surrogate, and failed maternal figures in The Old Curiosity Shop, and how their presence or absence shapes the fates of the novel's children.

memes.label: Mr. Abel
memes.description: A mild-mannered notary's clerk in the Bevis Marks office of Mr. Witherden, who employs Kit Nubbles, drives a pony chaise, and becomes a trusted figure in the Garland household at Abel Cottage.

memes.label: Mr. Vuffin
memes.description: A showman in Codlin and Short's travelling Punch-and-Judy show, who discusses the economics of exhibiting "freaks" — giants and dwarfs — with his companion Jerry at the Jolly Sandboys inn.

memes.label: Mr. Witherden
memes.description: A notary of Bevis Marks who serves as a legal authority in the novel, assisting the grandfather's affairs, employing Kit Nubbles, and representing professional integrity in a world of legal corruption.

memes.label: Mrs. Garland
memes.description: The wife of Mr. Garland and mother of Abel Garland, a kind maternal figure who lives at Abel Cottage, Finchley, and helps hire Kit Nubbles into the Garland household.

memes.label: Mrs. Jarley
memes.description: The proprietor of Jarley's Waxwork in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Mrs. Jarley's Waxwork
memes.description: The travelling waxwork exhibition owned by Mrs. Jarley, a pivotal object in the novel that provides Nell Trent with employment and shelter while embodying the tension between reality and artifice that runs throughout the story.

memes.label: Mrs. Jarley's Waxworks
memes.description: The traveling waxwork exhibition that employs Nell and her grandfather in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Mrs. Jiniwin
memes.description: Quilp's mother-in-law, a stout, quarrelsome old lady who lives with the Quilps on Tower Hill and provides comic relief through her persistent efforts to defend her daughter against Daniel Quilp's cruelty. Her maiden name was Jiniwin; her daughter married Quilp and became Mrs. Quilp.

memes.label: Mrs. Nubbles
memes.description: Kit Nubbles's widowed mother — a laundress whose anxious love for her son, humble dignity, and quiet endurance of poverty make her one of the novel's most sympathetic portraits of working-class motherhood

memes.label: Mrs. Quilp
memes.description: The long-suffering wife of Daniel Quilp in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Mrs. Quilp's Rebellion
memes.description: Mrs. Quilp's rare act of defiance against her tyrannical husband in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Mrs. Wackles
memes.description: A widow who runs a day school in Chelsea and the mother of Sophy, Jane, and Melissa Wackles; her shrewd management of her establishment and her daughters' prospects reflects the economic precariousness of respectable widowhood in Victorian London.

memes.label: Nature
memes.description: The role of the natural world as a healing counterpoint to urban corruption and a mirror of spiritual states in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Nell and the Allegorical Mode
memes.description: How Dickens uses allegorical techniques through Nell Trent, contrasting her symbolic function with the novel's naturalistic characters

memes.label: Nell Trent
memes.description: The young protagonist and moral center in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Nell's Death
memes.description: The peaceful death of Nell Trent, the novel's emotional climax in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Nell's Flight from London
memes.description: Nell and her grandfather flee London to escape Quilp and their creditors in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Pathos
memes.description: Pathos as a defining literary mode of The Old Curiosity Shop, examining Dickens's use of sentiment, emotion, and the aesthetics of feeling.

memes.label: Playing Cards
memes.description: The deck of cards used by Grandfather Trent in his obsessive nocturnal gambling, a physical object that embodies the destructive power of addiction and the cruel illusion of wealth that drives the novel's central tragedy.

memes.label: Poverty
memes.description: The depiction of poverty as a social condition that shapes character, constrains choice, and exposes systemic injustice in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Power and Possession
memes.description: The interconnected themes of coercive authority, material ownership, and the struggle for autonomy in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Pride
memes.description: Pride as it operates in The Old Curiosity Shop — the grandfather's destructive pride that refuses help, the honest pride of the working poor, and Dickens's careful distinction between the vice of arrogance and the virtue of self-respect

memes.label: Progress
memes.description: The concept of progress — physical, social, and moral — in The Old Curiosity Shop, where movement through space becomes a measure of spiritual and social advancement.

memes.label: Punch and Judy
memes.description: The puppet show operated by Thomas Codlin and Short Trotters, a travelling street entertainment that provides comic relief, narrative counterpoint, and a symbolic lens on domestic violence and social performance in the novel.

memes.label: Quilp's Drowning
memes.description: The dramatic death of Daniel Quilp by drowning in the Thames in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Quilp's Poker
memes.description: Daniel Quilp's poker — the domestic weapon with which he terrorizes his wife and mother-in-law, a symbol of his grotesque domestic tyranny and the physical menace that pervades the Quilp household on Tower Hill.

memes.label: Quilp's Wharf
memes.description: The damp, decaying wharf on the Thames where Daniel Quilp lives and conducts business in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Redemption
memes.description: The theme of redemption in The Old Curiosity Shop, expressed through moral salvation, the redemption of vows, and the novel's Christian moral framework.

memes.label: Regret and Remorse
memes.description: Regret as a moral emotion in The Old Curiosity Shop — the grandfather's consuming remorse, the narrator's elegiac reflections on lost time, and the novel's suggestion that regret, when genuine, is the beginning of moral wisdom

memes.label: Rest
memes.description: The elusive state of repose and peace in The Old Curiosity Shop — denied to the wandering protagonists and ultimately found only in death.

memes.label: Revenge
memes.description: Revenge as a motive and moral force in The Old Curiosity Shop — the desire for retaliation that shapes character action and reveals Dickens's ethical framework.

memes.label: Sacrifice
memes.description: The theme of sacrifice in The Old Curiosity Shop, explored through character, plot, and Dickens's moral vision

memes.label: Sally Brass
memes.description: The formidable sister and legal partner of Sampson Brass in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Sampson Brass
memes.description: The corrupt lawyer who serves Quilp's schemes in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Secrecy
memes.description: The pervasive role of secrecy, concealment, and hidden knowledge in The Old Curiosity Shop, driving the plot's central conflicts.

memes.label: Sentiment
memes.description: The role of feeling, emotion, and sensibility as a moral compass in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Short Trotters
memes.description: A Punch-and-Judy showman and partner of Thomas Codlin in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Single Gentleman
memes.description: The mysterious lodger who plays a key role in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Sleep
memes.description: Sleep and sleeplessness in The Old Curiosity Shop — physical rest, death's semblance, and the moral weight of disturbed slumber in Dickens's narrative.

memes.label: Sorrow
memes.description: The pervasive theme of sorrow and grief as both personal affliction and universal human experience in The Old Curiosity Shop

memes.label: Suffering
memes.description: The theme of suffering in The Old Curiosity Shop, explored through character, plot, and Dickens's moral vision

memes.label: Temptation
memes.description: Temptation as moral trial in The Old Curiosity Shop — the seduction of gambling, the lure of easy fortune, and the ethical significance of resistance or surrender.

memes.label: The Bachelor
memes.description: A kindly little old gentleman, the village schoolmaster's friend, who befriends Nell and her grandfather and represents the quiet compassion and community care central to the novel's moral vision. Also referred to as the bachelor schoolmaster.

memes.label: The Beadle
memes.description: A minor parish officer who appears at the margins of the novel's institutional landscape — a figure of petty authority whose presence signals the reach of parish officialdom into the lives of the poor and the vagrant.

memes.label: The Beauteous Countryside
memes.description: The pastoral landscape that provides healing counterpoint to urban corruption in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Brass Plate
memes.description: The door plate of Sampson Brass's Bevis Marks law office, bearing the name "Brass" — a symbolic object that represents the veneer of professional respectability covering legal corruption, and the focal point of Dick Swiveller's reflections on his employment.

memes.label: The Brasses
memes.description: The sibling duo of Sally Brass and Sampson Brass, who together run a legal practice in Bevis Marks and serve as accomplices to Daniel Quilp in his schemes.

memes.label: The Brasses' Office
memes.description: The cramped legal office of Sampson and Sally Brass in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Church
memes.description: The peaceful country church where Nell Trent finds her final rest, where she and her grandfather linger in quiet contemplation, and where the old man dies beside her grave — a place of sanctuary that bookends the novel's wandering journey.

memes.label: The Churchyard
memes.description: The peaceful churchyard where Nell is ultimately laid to rest in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Clergyman
memes.description: The unnamed clergyman whose horse Nell encounters on the road in Chapter 16 and who later officiates at Nell's funeral; a minor but symbolically weighted figure representing the consolations and limitations of institutional religion in a novel preoccupied with private virtue.

memes.label: The Curiosity Dealer's Warehouse
memes.description: The back room of the shop where the grandfather's secrets are kept in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Discovery of the Shop's Secrets
memes.description: The revelation of the grandfather's debts and the loss of the curiosity shop in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Doctor
memes.description: A red-nosed medical practitioner who attends the Marchioness during her illness and later serves the household of the bachelor and the single gentleman.

memes.label: The Final Reconciliation
memes.description: The resolution of relationships and revelation of truths after Nell's death in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Fire
memes.description: The destruction of the Curiosity Shop by fire — a pivotal event that severs the last physical link to Nell and her grandfather's former life, reveals Quilp's presence among the ruins, and marks the novel's transition from London intrigue to the final drive towards narrative resolution.
aliases: the burning of the Curiosity Shop

memes.label: The Grandfather
memes.description: Nell Trent's grandfather and owner of the Old Curiosity Shop, an elderly man whose obsessive gambling to secure his granddaughter's financial future leads to their ruin, flight from London, and ultimately his death beside Nell in the countryside.

memes.label: The Grandfather's Gambling
memes.description: The compulsive gambling that drives the novel's central conflict in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Industrial Town
memes.description: The grim manufacturing town that represents the dehumanizing effects of industry in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Inn
memes.description: A waystation on the journey where Nell and her grandfather rest in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Jolly Sandboys
memes.description: A small roadside inn on the way to the race town, distinguished by its sign depicting three Sandboys with jugs of ale and bags of gold, where Nell and her grandfather encounter Codlin and Short's Punch and Judy show and a colourful assembly of travelling showpeople.

memes.label: The Journey Begins
memes.description: The departure from London and the beginning of the picaresque pilgrimage in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Key
memes.description: The iron key to the curiosity shop, wielded by both Nell and Daniel Quilp as an instrument of access and control — a physical object that embodies the struggle between guardianship and possession, freedom and entrapment.

memes.label: The Marchioness
memes.description: The abused servant girl in the Brass household in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Marchioness's Rescue
memes.description: The small servant's courageous act to save Kit from wrongful conviction in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Meeting with the Single Gentleman
memes.description: The revelation of the single gentleman's identity and connection to Nell in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Narrator's First Encounter
memes.description: Master Humphrey's first meeting with Nell on the streets of London at night in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Notary's Office
memes.description: The legal office where key plot machinations unfold in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Old Curiosity Shop
memes.description: The titular antique shop in a forgotten corner of London, home to Nell Trent and her grandfather — a place where musty relics and the weight of the past mirror the moral and psychological state of its inhabitants in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Ostler
memes.description: A minor figure at an inn on the travellers' road who delivers a memorable judgment on Daniel Quilp's character — one of the few instances in the novel of a stranger recognising Quilp's essential wickedness at a glance.

memes.label: The Racecourse
memes.description: A site of gambling and moral danger on Nell and her grandfather's journey in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Schoolmaster
memes.description: A kindly village teacher who shelters Nell and her grandfather in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Schoolmaster's Cottage
memes.description: The modest dwelling of the benevolent village schoolmaster in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Sexton
memes.description: An aged, deaf sexton who tends the churchyard where Nell Trent encounters mortality and reflects on death during her final journey.

memes.label: The Single Gentleman
memes.description: A mysterious, bald lodger who takes rooms at Sampson Brass's office on Bevis Marks, pays handsomely in advance, communicates almost exclusively through Dick Swiveller, and shows an obsessive interest in Punch and Judy shows — later revealed to be closely connected to Nell Trent's family.

memes.label: The Travelling Show
memes.description: The travelling Punch and Judy show operated by Codlin and Short, an itinerant puppet theatre that Nell and her grandfather encounter in a country churchyard and travel with toward the races, representing the precarious world of Victorian roadside entertainers.

memes.label: The Valiant Soldier
memes.description: A well-known country inn run by James "Jem" Groves, where Nell and her grandfather stop during their wanderings and where the landlord proudly proclaims his establishment's fame — "everybody knew the Valiant Soldier as well as the church catechism."

memes.label: The Village
memes.description: The peaceful rural village where Nell and her grandfather find temporary refuge in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Wackles
memes.description: The Wackles family of Chelsea — widow Mrs. Wackles, who keeps a day-school, and her daughters Jane and Sophy — most notable for Sophy Wackles, the object of Dick Swiveller's romantic attentions until she marries the market-gardener Cheggs.

memes.label: The Waxworks Interlude
memes.description: Nell and her grandfather's employment at Mrs. Jarley's traveling exhibition in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: The Will
memes.description: The suppressed last will and testament at the centre of the novel's legal conspiracy — Quilp's scheme to conceal the grandfather's true wishes, the Brasses' complicity, and the eventual exposure of the plot that restores justice to Kit and reveals the Single Gentleman's claim to kinship and inheritance.

memes.label: Thomas Codlin
memes.description: A Punch-and-Judy showman in The Old Curiosity Shop by Charles Dickens

memes.label: Tom Scott
memes.description: Daniel Quilp's grotesque servant and constant companion — a figure whose physical deformity mirrors his master's moral deformity and whose silent presence amplifies the atmosphere of menace that surrounds Quilp wherever he goes

memes.label: Transcendence
memes.description: The movement beyond material suffering toward spiritual peace that culminates in Nell's death and apotheosis in The Old Curiosity Shop.

memes.label: Wandering and the Road
memes.description: The motif of wandering in The Old Curiosity Shop — physical flight from danger, spiritual pilgrimage, and the road as a space of transformation where the novel's deepest encounters occur

memes.label: Waxwork
memes.description: Mrs. Jarley's Waxwork — a travelling exhibition of life-sized wax figures that becomes Nell Trent's unlikely employer and introduces a surreal, satirical dimension to the novel's exploration of reality and artifice.

memes.label: Wealth and Poverty
memes.description: The opposition between material wealth and destitution as a structuring moral axis in The Old Curiosity Shop, where money functions simultaneously as object of desire and source of corruption.

memes.label: Women
memes.description: The condition, agency, and representation of women in The Old Curiosity Shop — gendered constraints, female solidarity, and Dickens's ambivalent feminism.

memes.label: Work
memes.description: Work, labor, and toil in The Old Curiosity Shop — the economic necessity that defines character, the dignity and degradation of labor, and Dickens's vision of a society built on work.
